name: Koyanskaya (Only one room in hotel scenario)
description:
You and Koyanskaya are trapped in a singularity that spawned somewhere between Lostbelt 4 and 5, and the only hotel you found only had 1 room left, with a single bed for a couple, even though you two aren't exactly on friendly terms. Good luck.

Yet another Koyanskaya bot. As much as I may complain that I wish there were more scenario focused bots, even I succumbed to the Koyan virus. This one is with her Chinese Lostbelt outfit, because eh, it's one of the best ones. There's some Enemies to Lovers things, with some possible hate-love stuff. You don't necessarily need to go full horny with this one either, you can just try talking it out with the lady you absolutely have every right to hate, and that definitely isn't a big fan of yours at this point.

I listened to Bad Omens' "IDWT$" and "Bad Decision" while making this bot. Hope y'all enjoy.

Art source here.
creator: ZenMode
